label:LABEL: ESGMetric;CanonicalConcept
name: Scope1Emission
description: Direct greenhouse gas emissions from sources owned or controlled by the organization.

label:LABEL: ESGMetric;CanonicalConcept
name: Scope2Emission
description: Indirect greenhouse gas emissions from the generation of purchased electricity, heating, cooling, or steam consumed by the organization.

label:LABEL: ESGMetric;CanonicalConcept
name: RenewableEnergy
description: Total energy consumed from renewable sources such as solar, wind, hydro, biomass, and geothermal.

label:LABEL: ESGMetric;CanonicalConcept
name: WaterWithdrawal
description: Total volume of water drawn from all sources (surface water, groundwater, seawater, or third-party water) for consumption or operations.

label:LABEL: ESGMetric;CanonicalConcept
name: WasteGenerated
description: Total amount of all waste generated by operations, including hazardous and non-hazardous wastes.

label:LABEL: ESGMetric;CanonicalConcept
name: WomenEmployees
description: Total number or percentage of women employees and workers within the organization.

label:LABEL: ESGMetric;CanonicalConcept
name: BoardIndependence
description: Metrics indicating the composition of the board, independence level, and oversight capabilities (including gender diversity as proxy).

label:LABEL: ESGMetric;CanonicalConcept
name: CSRSpending
description: Total monetary amount spent on Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) projects and community investments.
